title: DSL Parser with AST
description: Implement a parser for a simple DSL (query language) with lexer, parser, and AST representation.
requirements: Parse query DSL: SELECT fields FROM table WHERE conditions
Implement Lexer class producing Token stream
Implement Parser class producing AST nodes
Define AST node types: Select, Field, Table, Where, BinaryOp, etc.
Implement AST visitor pattern for evaluation/compilation
